meta.description: Playable species for hero creation. Each species defines starting Characteristics, wound/strain base thresholds, speed, and mechanical abilities. Total characteristic points = 12 for all species.

human.name: Human

abilities.name: Adaptable
abilities.description: Recover 1 additional strain during Rest actions. Humans are versatile and recover composure quickly.

human.description: Versatile and adaptable. Humans are the most common species in the galaxy.

twilek.name: Twi'lek

abilities.name: Beguiling
abilities.description: Upgrade attack pool once when making social skill checks. Natural charm and lekku body language give Twi'leks an edge in negotiations.

twilek.description: Charismatic and resilient. Twi'leks are natural leaders and negotiators.

wookiee.name: Wookiee

abilities.name: Wookiee Rage
abilities.description: +1 damage on melee/Brawl attacks when wounded. The legendary Wookiee berserker fury makes them more dangerous as they take damage.

abilities.name: Intimidating
abilities.description: Immune to Fear condition. Wookiees do not break -- they break others.

wookiee.description: Powerful and loyal. Wookiees are fearsome warriors with an unbreakable honor code.

rodian.name: Rodian

abilities.name: Expert Tracker
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on the first attack each activation. Born hunters, Rodians have an innate sense for lining up the perfect shot.

rodian.description: Quick and perceptive. Rodians are born hunters with excellent reflexes.

trandoshan.name: Trandoshan

abilities.name: Regeneration
abilities.description: Recover 1 wound at the start of each activation (if wounded). Trandoshans can regrow lost limbs over time; in combat, minor wounds close rapidly.

trandoshan.description: Brutal and relentless. Trandoshans worship the Scorekeeper and live for the hunt.

bothan.name: Bothan

abilities.name: Convincing Demeanor
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Deception and Streetwise checks. Many Bothans died to bring us this information -- but these ones are very good at not dying.

bothan.description: Shrewd and resourceful. Bothans are master spies and information brokers.

droid.name: Droid

abilities.name: Inorganic
abilities.description: Immune to Poison and Fear conditions. Droids lack biological vulnerabilities but cannot benefit from stimpacks (use repair patches instead).

abilities.name: Enduring Chassis
abilities.description: +1 soak from reinforced plating. Droids are built to take punishment.

droid.description: Immune to Poison and Fear. Droids are built for purpose with reinforced chassis plating.
